---
species: "Codium fragile"
accepted_code: "COFR"
alternate_codes: "COF" 
diminutive: #"CODE" # uncomment and fill in if one exists
alternate_diminutives: # "CODE" for single or ["CODE1", "CODE2"] for >1
common_name: "Dead man's fingers"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "Green algae with a thick spongey texture that branches like fingers." # make sure to fill this in!
image: '/header_images/codium_fragile_Saryu Mae_INat.jpeg'
image_credit: 'Photo from INaturalist NZ taken by Saryu Mae.' # MUST have an image credit
categories:
  - green algae
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
    - lsw_quad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: CAAB 80 300000
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 145086
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Highly branched green algae with a spongy thallus. 

<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=145086)**
